title: Frozian (language)

'''Frozian''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Frozian/Legends|Frozian]] species, natives of the devastated world of [[Froz]]. Frozians were usually bilingual, speaking both Frozian language and the predominant language of their adopted [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], as Froz was no longer inhabited. The language had a written form.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
